name: Rally Health (Optum) Employee Wellbeing API
what_it_does: Rally Health (Optum/UnitedHealth Group) Employee Wellbeing REST API for health engagement, benefits navigation, and wellness program management integrated with UnitedHealthcare benefits. Enables AI agents to manage member wellness program enrollment and health challenge participation, handle health assessment and risk stratification for population health management, access cost transparency and provider search for healthcare decision support, retrieve care navigation and advocacy automation for health plan utilization, manage wellness incentive tracking and reward distribution for engagement motivation, handle preventive care reminders and gap in care outreach for population health, access mental health and EAP program navigation for behavioral health support, retrieve pharmacy benefit optimization and medication adherence for clinical automation, manage telehealth and virtual care access for care delivery, and integrate Rally with UnitedHealthcare, Optum, and employer HRIS platforms.
use_cases: Guiding members through benefits from navigation agents
Tracking wellness participation from engagement agents
Identifying care gaps from population health agents
Navigating mental health resources from behavioral health agents
not_for: Employers not using UnitedHealthcare or Optum health plans
Small employers below UHG enterprise threshold
best_when: An employer using UnitedHealthcare or Optum wants AI agents to automate wellness engagement, benefits navigation, care gap outreach, health risk stratification, and preventive care reminders for their employee population.
avoid_when: UHG ECOSYSTEM LOCK-IN: Rally Health is deeply integrated with UnitedHealthcare and Optum; automated workflows assume UHG health plan data access; employers using non-UHG health plans have limited Rally functionality and data access. PHI population health — automated population health risk stratification using health plan claims and clinical data involves PHI; BAA required and HIPAA minimum necessary standard applies to all automated population health analytics. ADA/GINA wellness compliance — automated Rally wellness programs with HRA and biometric components must comply with ADA voluntary requirements and GINA genetic information prohibitions; verify EEOC wellness program rule compliance for automated incentive programs. Mental health parity — automated mental health navigation and EAP referral must comply with Mental Health Parity and Addiction Equity Act (MHPAEA); automated mental health benefit access must not impose more restrictive limits than medical/surgical benefits.

auth.notes: Rally Health uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes via Optum Developer platform. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2012. Acquired by UnitedHealth Group/Optum (2014). Part of Optum (UHG NYSE). UHG revenue $350B+. Rally powers UnitedHealthcare member wellness platform. Limited API access outside UHG ecosystem. Competes with Limeade, Virgin Pulse, and Castlight for employee wellbeing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — bundled with UnitedHealthcare health plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Bundled with UHG health plan or standalone employer subscription
pricing.notes: San Francisco. UHG/Optum subsidiary. Founded 2012. Acquired 2014. Part of $350B UHG. Bundled with UHC health plans. Competes with Limeade and Virgin Pulse.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; UHG enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: UHG ECOSYSTEM DEPENDENCY: Rally API access is deeply tied to UnitedHealthcare and Optum data ecosystems; automated workflows for employers using non-UHG health plans have severely limited Rally data access and functionality

PHI population health BAA requirement — automated population health risk scoring using UHG health plan claims requires HIPAA BAA with Rally/Optum; automated analytics without BAA create HIPAA violation
ADA/GINA wellness incentive compliance — automated Rally HRA and biometric wellness incentives must comply with ADA voluntary participation requirement and GINA family medical history prohibition

MHPAEA mental health parity — automated mental health navigation must not impose more restrictive automated decision logic than medical/surgical benefits; automated mental health care management must comply with MHPAEA parity requirements

Limited external API access — Rally Health API documentation is not publicly available and access is restricted to UHG ecosystem partners; third-party API access may be limited or require UHG technology partnership
No webhooks — wellness event and engagement notification requires polling; no native push for wellness milestone completion or care gap alert events
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee wellbeing. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Employee PHI and health engagement data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee wellbeing. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2 with scopes. US. Employee PHI and health data.
